lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function like new. The exterior is flawless with no paint chips, dents, or scratches. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor, with a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that has been meticulously cared for. This is a rare find for anyone seeking perfection in their next ride!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently maintained by its previous owner. The exterior paint retains a nice luster, though you will find some minor imperfections such as small door dings and light scratches typical of regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, showing only light wear on the seating surfaces and touchpoints. Mechanically, the car performs reliably, with all major systems functioning as intended and a history of regular service. It offers a solid, dependable driving experience for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for those prioritizing utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches and a minor dent on the driver-side door. Inside, the cabin is functional but exhibits clear signs of wear, including some fading on the dashboard and minor stains on the rear seats. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though the next owner should plan for a standard tune-up and new brake pads soon.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including large dents and areas of rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and broken components. Several mechanical systems require repair.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey! 👋 Check out this absolute beauty! It's honestly in pristine condition—I've taken such good care of it, it still feels brand new. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I'm looking for a good home for this gem, so let's chat!

Pristine condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Clean title.
Used car. Condition: mint.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected and meticulously preserved, this vehicle caters to the most discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and peak performance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects its showroom-grade status. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure uncompromised performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this offering provides an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle in flawless condition.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is—it’s been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Everything is absolutely pristine, from the spotless interior to the gleaming paint. It drives like a total dream and is just waiting for someone to take it on a new adventure. Come check it out, you’re going to love it!

This concours-level example features a naturally aspirated 3.8L flat-six powerplant mated to a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The mechanical integrity is beyond reproach, boasting a documented service history with recent bore scoring inspection and IMS bearing verification. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by factory-spec PASM, while the exterior retains its original factory clear coat with consistent micron readings across all panels. Zero parasitic draws, crisp synchros, and a pristine undercarriage define this turn-key investment. This is a collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Service records available. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its initial purchase. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster, entirely free from swirl marks, stone chips, or any surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear or creasing, and all interior surfaces, including the dashboard and door panels, are immaculate. Mechanically, the car performs flawlessly, with a comprehensive service record documented from day one. Every electronic feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with the precision of a new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the factory floor. Serious inquiries only for this investment-grade specimen.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom-level condition. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets the most discerning expectations of quality and performance. An investment-grade specimen for the serious enthusiast who demands uncompromising perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle is maintained in showroom-original condition, featuring a pristine exterior finish and an interior devoid of wear. Our master technicians have certified its mechanical integrity, ensuring performance that mirrors its initial delivery. This offering represents a definitive acquisition for the connoisseur seeking a benchmark example of the model.

Hey there! You have absolutely got to see this beauty! I’ve taken such incredible care of this car that it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot—it is in truly mint condition. It’s been my pride and joy, always kept in the garage and pampered every single day. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure with you. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This E46-generation M3 is a superlative example of BMW’s high-revving naturally aspirated heritage. Under the hood, the S54 3.2L inline-six engine operates with surgical precision, featuring individual throttle bodies and a fully serviced dual-VANOS system for optimized valve timing across the power band. Power is delivered through a tactile Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional traction. The chassis integrity is verified with proactive subframe reinforcement, and the suspension retains its original geometry with fresh bushings and Sachs dampers. This vehicle represents a museum-quality specimen with a flawless service history and no mechanical deviations from factory specifications.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Service records available. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, having been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed under my ownership. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery shows absolutely no signs of wear, the bolsters are firm, and the original factory scent still lingers. Every feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control and advanced driver-assist technology, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, accompanied by a comprehensive, documented service history from the dealership. The engine bay is spotless, and the responsive powertrain delivers a smooth, quiet ride that feels as tight as the day it first left the assembly line. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that is truly indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects its distinguished provenance. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance. For the discerning buyer seeking a showroom-quality acquisition, this vehicle offers an unrivaled ownership experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard and preserved in showroom condition. This unit is distinguished by its pristine exterior finish and an interior that remains virtually untouched, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original state. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and investment-grade preservation.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolute mint condition—it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and spotless. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title in hand. Inspection ready.

This is a collector-grade vehicle in truly flawless, showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or swirl marks, having been professionally ceramic coated and garage-kept since day one. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the hand-stitched leather is supple with no bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent persists. Every button, screen, and switch functions with tactile precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively through authorized dealerships. This car has never seen rain, has never been smoked in, and is entirely free of any performance modifications. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and remarkably smooth. Included are all original keys, manuals, and a thick folder of maintenance records. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no visible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque. Inspection by appointment is highly recommended.
